title: Carbon Pricing MRV Gap Analysis — Nepal
description: Comprehensive institutional MRV mapping, reporting architecture, verification pathways, and registry/compliance logic for Nepal's carbon pricing framework. Reviews monitoring, reporting, and verification gaps across key sectors.

title: Community Cookstove Programme — Impact Assessment Report
description: Field assessment of electric cookstove programme outcomes across 1,000+ households in rural Nepal, focusing on adoption constraints, fuel savings, indoor air quality improvements, and emission reductions.
